dsl_rule.translation_notes: Belt Hold (Bearish) pattern: Entry requires a black candle (close < open) with open near/at high and close near low, with large body relative to range. The uptrend context is assumed to be pre-validated by the backtest engine. Exit uses a reversal condition (close crosses above open) since AUTHOR_SILENT was specified. Body_pct > 0.7 ensures the candle is predominantly body with minimal wicks (marubozu characteristic). Open >= high is approximated as open at the high since exact equality is difficult to achieve in real data.

source_rule_text: Belt Hold: A candlestick pattern that opens at the high and closes near the low, forming a black opening marubozu candle, occurring after an uptrend
